basic_details.job_title: Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 60 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Candidates searching for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Vacancy 2026 details can refer to the quick summary below for an instant overview of the post, organization, vacancy count, last date, and application mode.

application_fee.details: Candidates applying for the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Apply Online 2026 process must pay the application fee online between 30 June and 22 July 2026. The fee differs by category as shown below. | Payment can be made using Debit Card, Credit Card, or Internet Banking only. No other mode of payment, including DD, Challan, or Cheque, shall be accepted.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Bharti 2026 shall not exceed 23 years, meaning applicants must be born on or after 23 July 2003. | Category Age Relaxation OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years SC/ST 5 years

qualification.details: Candidates checking eligibility for the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 should note that the minimum qualification is a pass in X Standard, while the maximum qualification allowed is a pass in XII Standard. Applicants with higher qualifications such as Degree, Diploma, or ITI are not eligible to apply. | The upper age limit for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Bharti 2026 shall not exceed 23 years, meaning applicants must be born on or after 23 July 2003. | The minimum qualification must be from a University/Institute/Examination Board recognized by AICTE, appropriate statutory authority, or State/Central Government. Applicants with equivalent qualifications must submit an Equivalency Certificate issued by the competent authority.

salary_details.details: Candidates wondering about the stipend for the CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 can refer to the details below. Selected trainees will undergo a three-month training period with a fixed monthly stipend. | Successful trainees may be considered for contractual posts at the discretion of CSL, depending on organisational requirements, vacancy availability, and individual performance. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: Selection for the Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Bharti 2026 will be through a Physical Test carrying 100 marks. Candidates wondering about the qualifying criteria can note that the minimum pass marks vary by category.

Scrutiny of Applications: Shortlisting based on certificates uploaded in the online application. Certificate Verification: Only shortlisted candidates who clear certificate verification will be permitted to attend the Physical Test. Physical Test: 100 marks
scheduled on a later date. Rank List: Prepared based on marks secured in the Physical Test among eligible candidates.
The minimum pass mark is 50% for UR and EWS
and 40% for SC/ST candidates. CSL may relax the minimum pass mark if the number of qualified candidates is insufficient.

all_official_links.label: Download Cochin Shipyard Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 PDF Link

faq.question: Q1. Has Cochin Shipyard Limited officially released the Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes, CSL released the official notification for Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026 on 26 June 2026 under Reference No. CSL/P&A/RECTT/CONTRACT/Scaffolder Trainee/2026/7.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 60 total vacancies distributed across UR (24), OBC (21), SC (8), ST (1), and EWS (6) categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹200 (non-refundable, plus bank charges) for UR/OBC/EWS candidates, while SC/ST candidates are exempted from payment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 23 years as on 22 July 2026, meaning applicants must be born on or after 23 July 2003, with relaxation of 3 years for OBC and 5 years for SC/ST.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Physical Test carrying 100 marks, preceded by certificate verification of shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the stipend for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected trainees will receive a consolidated monthly stipend of ₹10,000 during the three-month training period.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualification required for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum qualification of pass in X Standard and a maximum qualification of pass in XII Standard; higher qualifications like Degree, Diploma, or ITI are not eligible.

faq.question: Q9. How can candidates apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through www.cochinshipyard.in under the Career page (CSL, Kochi) from 30 June 2026 to 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) apply for CSL Scaffolder Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, PwBD candidates are not eligible to apply since the job involves working at heights and materials handling, which poses serious risk.
